forRent.title: Dolphin Blue Paradise
forRent.shortDescription: Experience 100% off-grid luxury in one of the world's most biodiverse destinations. Personalized service, farm-to-table dining, and unforgettable eco-adventures.
forRent.fullDescription: Dolphin Blue Paradise is an independent eco-lodge with cabañas, meals, and guided tours. Contact them directly for rates and availability.

forRent.title: Finca Montezuma
forRent.shortDescription: A tropical food forest and sanctuary offering farmstays, nature & chocolate tours, a plant nursery and farm shop.

forRent.title: Casa Del Mar
forRent.shortDescription: Welcome to your private carbon-neutral Caribbean over-the-water villa. You will have access to intrepid adventures or just relax in a hammock overlooking the sea.

forRent.title: Casita Del Mar
forRent.shortDescription: An eco aqua villa built over the Caribbean ocean in Dolphin Bay with direct access to beautiful hiking trails and stocked with snorkel gear, paddleboards and kayaks for guests to use.

forRent.title: Finca Coconuts
forRent.shortDescription: A private rental property within the FBV community.

forRent.title: Vista Paraiso
forRent.shortDescription: A private rental property within the FBV community.
